introSection: Loop Screw Coaster (Japanese: ループ･スクリューコースター) was a steel roller coaster previously located at Seibuen Yuenchi in Tokorozawa, Saitama, Japan.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 2 trains with 5 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 24 riders per train.

fullText:
Loop Screw Coaster (Japanese: ループ･スクリューコースター) was a steel roller coaster previously located at Seibuen Yuenchi in Tokorozawa, Saitama, Japan.



Pink track and supports.

2 trains with 5 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 24 riders per train.
